response.overview: Four girls get trapped in a cabin when a cryptic note reveals their only chance of survival is to play a series of deadly games that forces them to confront their deepest fears. Every hour, one girl is chosen to play a game to face unbearable pain-or make another suffer. With time running out, they must find a way to escape before the clock strikes again.
response.tagline: This isn’t just a game.  It’s a test.  And not everyone makes it out.
response.title: Game Night: Into the Dollhouse
